user.title: Connect to your OKOK scale
user.description: Enter (or pick) the Bluetooth MAC address of your scale.

error.invalid_mac: That doesn't look like a valid MAC address (expected e.g. F0:2C:59:F1:F0:28).

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one OKOK scale can be configured.

add_person.title: Add a person
add_person.description: Nothing is saved yet - the next step arms a capture window, and the profile is only created once a weighing actually comes in.

add_person_done.title: Step on the scale now
add_person_done.description: Have **{name}** step on the scale now. {live_reading} {seconds_left} seconds left. Once the reading locks, this dialog closes on its own and *then* creates {name}'s profile - nothing is saved before that. Click Submit to check now, or again later.

remove_person.title: Remove a person
remove_person.description: Their CSV history is kept on disk; only the entities and registration are removed.

data_description.body_fat_formula: Used internally as an input to each person's body-fat baseline - not shown directly (see README). All options are BMI/age/sex based; the scale's impedance reading isn't used by any of them.

error.not_yet_weighed: No weighing detected yet. Step on the scale, then click Submit again.

abort.no_people: There are no registered people yet - add one first.
abort.registration_timed_out: {name} didn't step on the scale in time, so nothing was saved - no profile was created. Start again with "Add a person" if you still want to register them.
